title: Smart AI routing explained
summary: IBM Technology argues that AI labs are moving away from prioritizing the largest models toward smart routing approaches. The shift emphasizes cost efficiency and reliability as key concerns over raw model scale.
writeup: IBM Technology makes the case that AI labs are shifting away from prioritizing the largest possible models and toward smart routing, the practice of directing requests across models rather than defaulting to one big model. The argument matters because it reframes the priorities for AI systems: cost efficiency and reliability take precedence over raw model scale. The video touches on routing, scaling, and local inference as the concepts behind this shift.
